creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad We visited the busiest restaurant in @canarywharflondon and it’s so worth the hype 🔥 Huge portions, affordable prices, and hand-pulled noodles made fresh to order, as thin or as wide as you’d like! You’ll be coming back time and time again for these, they’re that good!

📍 @jwd.noodle @jwd_handpull_canarywharf Unit 2, 40 Bank St, Canary Wharf Estate, London E14 5DA
✅ Fully halal

geo_locations: @jwd.noodle @jwd_handpull_canarywharf Unit 2, 40 Bank St, Canary Wharf Estate, London E14 5DA
pinned_places: @jwd.noodle @jwd_handpull_canarywharf Unit 2, 40 Bank St, Canary Wharf Estate, London E14 5DA

transcription.text: Okay so apparently this is one of the busiest restaurants in the whole of Canary Wharf. You will always find queues here during the lunch rush and here's the reason why. These guys are serving the freshest hand-pulled noodles straight from northern China and the Chinese head chef here known as the master has been hand-pulling noodles for over 30 years. They make these noodles fresh to order and you can pick how wide you want your noodles to be. Pick from their signature dry noodles or soup noodles and make sure you try their sides because they are delicious too. The portion sizes are massive and the price is so affordable and they're also completely halal. This is JWD Lamin Noodle Bar in Canary Wharf. Make sure you check them out and share it with someone who would love to go.
